typethis 0.8.0

  • Changelog

Build an ODCS v3 contract from typed models

Source: R/datacontract.R
to_datacontract.Rd

Returns the contract as a native R list, ready for yaml::write_yaml() or further programmatic manipulation. Methods exist for typed model instances, model constructors, character class names, and lists of any of these.

Usage

to_datacontract(x, info = NULL, servers = NULL, ...)

Arguments

x

A typed model instance, a model constructor, a model class name (character scalar), or a character vector of class names. Use a vector to bundle multiple models into one contract.

info

Optional named list with top-level metadata. Recognised keys: id, name, version, status, description (string or list with purpose, usage, limitations), owner, tags.

servers

Optional named list of server definitions, passed through verbatim to ODCS. Example: list(production = list(type = "bigquery", project = "p", dataset = "d")).

...

Reserved for method extension.

Value

A named R list shaped as an ODCS v3 contract.

See also

write_datacontract() to write directly to disk; from_datacontract() for the reverse direction.

Other Data Contract: datacontract, datacontract_cli_available(), datacontract_export(), datacontract_lint(), datacontract_test(), from_datacontract(), read_datacontract(), write_datacontract()

Examples

define_model("Order", fields = list(
  order_id = field("character", primary_key = TRUE),
  amount   = field("numeric", validator = numeric_range(0, 1e6))
))

contract <- to_datacontract("Order",
  info = list(name = "orders", version = "1.0.0")
)
str(contract, max.level = 2)
#> List of 7
#>  $ apiVersion: chr "v3.0.2"
#>  $ kind      : chr "DataContract"
#>  $ id        : chr "Order"
#>  $ status    : chr "draft"
#>  $ name      : chr "orders"
#>  $ version   : chr "1.0.0"
#>  $ schema    :List of 1
#>   ..$ :List of 3
